response.justification: Candidate is a skilled full-stack software craftsman with ~16 years of hands-on engineering experience, but the role is a Director-level Principal IC focused on AI strategy, cloud platform differentiation, and advising strategic customers. The resume shows limited AI/ML depth (only recent MCP/agent tooling exposure), no cloud platform strategy or executive advisory experience, and no track record of recognized AI products, platforms, or industry thought leadership expected at this level.
strengths: ~16 years of broad engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infra
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Demonstrated knowledge sharing through talks, workshops, and open-source projects
concerns: No demonstrated AI/ML expertise, published products, or recognized platforms in AI
Lacks director-level scope, strategic advisory, or cross-org influence experience
Limited deep cloud platform strategy work; mostly product/feature engineering roles

key_factors.factor: Lack of recognized AI expertise and AI-built products
No director-level IC / strategic advisory track record
Strong long-tenure engineering breadth and craftsmanship
